title: The Indie Maker's Handbook
description: A comprehensive guide to launching and growing your first digital product from scratch. Covers ideation, building in public, pricing, and getting your first 100 customers.

title: Notion Business OS
description: A complete Notion workspace template with CRM, project tracker, content calendar, and financial dashboard. Instantly organize your entire business in one place.

title: Crypto Fundamentals Video Course
description: 12 hours of video content covering blockchain basics, DeFi, NFTs, wallet security, and how to evaluate projects. Perfect for beginners entering Web3.
